ogTitle: Bassendean vs Bateau Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bassendean and Bateau Bay.
heading: Bassendean vs Bateau Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bassendean, New South Wales and Bateau Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bateau Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Bassendean (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bassendean or Bateau Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bassendean has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Bateau Bay scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bassendean scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Bateau Bay scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bassendean or Bateau Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bateau Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
